---
title: "Projects"
title-block-banner: true
image: /assets/images/social-profile.png
subtitle: "*[{{< iconify fa7-solid:square-rss >}} RSS Feed](projects.xml)*"
listing:
  - id: projects
    template: assets/ejs/projects.ejs
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    sort: "date desc"
    filter-ui: true
    max-description-length: 300
    page-size: 9
    # fields: [image, title, description, categories]
    fields: [description, categories]
    feed:
      language: en-gb
    contents:

      - path: https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/essais/germanic/001/
        repo: https://github.com/esteeschwarz/SPUND-LX/tree/main/germanic/HA
        image: /projects/gemini.png
        title: "AI speech in human natural language"
        description: 'Study on manifestation of model typical language in human language corpora.'
        date: "2026-03-29"
        categories: [AI,corpus linguistics]
      - path: https://esteeschwarz.github.io/DC-LX/essais/sbc/
        repo: https://github.com/esteeschwarz/SPUND-LX/tree/main/corpusLX
        image: /projects/sbc.png
        title: "SPUND: corpus LX - santa barbara corpus essai"
        description: 'corpus building essai.'
        date: "2025-11-10"
        categories: [corpus linguistics,SBC]


---
## info
selected projects overview...
